headline: A Look At Home Depot (HD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent share performance and business scale Home Depot (HD) has seen its share price under pressure recently, with a 2% decline over the past day, about 3% over the past week, and roughly 16% over the past month. Over the past 3 months the stock is lower by about 7%, and the total return over the past year is about 10% lower, despite positive 3 year and 5 year total returns and a market value around US$320.4b. The business behind the stock is sizeable, with reported revenue of about US$164.7b...

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks That Concern Us
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
